clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the cortico-limbic and brainstem computations underlying the generation, experience, and autonomic regulation of valenced physiological states and emotional arousal.

These terms map onto the frontostriatal and mesolimbic macroscopic networks responsible for assigning subjective worth, translating incentives into goal-directed drives, and arbitrating economic choices.

This maps onto cortical midline and temporoparietal subsystems associated with abstract, internally-directed representations, functioning as a shared neural architecture for computing both self-referential identity and the mental states of others.
